{{Quote|Captain Solo is our tournament winner, gentlebeings.|Bith card dealer|<ref name="Rebel Dawn">''[[Rebel Dawn]]''</ref>}}
A [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] was the '''dealer''' in the [[Cloud City Sabacc Tournament]] final where [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] won the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] from [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]].
